name: Inogen Inc
summary: General Inogen, Inc. is a medical technology business that primarily focuses on respiratory health. We develop, manufacture, and market innovative respiratory health products, including portable oxygen concentrators, or POCs, used to deliver supplemental long-term oxygen therapy to patients suffering from chronic respiratory conditions and the Simeox product for airway clearance treatment.
